---
title: "Sports Data Visualization"
format: 
  html:
    lightbox: true
toc: true
---

## Static (In Progress)

### A. Global FIFA Rankings vs Average Player Values

:::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: Analysis of the relationship between average player value (Euros) and FIFA ranking. Data Source: transfermarkt \| FIFA](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz_2/4.png)
:::
::::

### B. East vs West: Analysis of FIFA Ranking and Player Values in Africa

:::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: Average player value is correlated with FIFA ranking in East and West Africa. Data Source: transfermarkt \| FIFA](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz_2/1.png){group="my-gallery2"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 2: Top player market value is correlated with FIFA ranking. Data Source: transfermarkt \| FIFA](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz_2/2.png){group="my-gallery2"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 3: Top players in West Africa have higher market values compared to East Africa. Data Source: transfermarkt](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz_2/3.png){group="my-gallery2"}
:::
::::::

### C. Analysis of African Players in the top 5 European Leagues

:::::::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Fig. 1: Number of minutes played by Africans in Top 5 European Leagues](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz/1.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 2: Number of Africans playing in the Top 5 European Leagues](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz/2.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 3: Number of minutes played per African player in Top 5 European Leagues](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz/3.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 4: Relationship between number of minutes played by Africans in Top 5 European Leagues and FIFA Ranking](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz/4.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 5: Relationship between number of African players in Top 5 European Leagues and FIFA Ranking](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz/5.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 6: Relationship between number of minutes played per African players in Top 5 European Leagues and FIFA Ranking](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz/6.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::

::: g-col-4
![Fig. 7: Best\* Season for Selected African Players in Top 5 European Leagues. *Best = highest goals (minus penalty kicks) + assists*](../../research/research_interests/sample_static_viz/7.png){group="my-gallery"}
:::
::::::::::



## Dynamic (In Progress)

### A: African Football Legends (1990 - Present)

<iframe src="https://african-football-legends.streamlit.app/?embed=true" style="height: 450px; width: 100%;">

</iframe>

[Link to App](https://african-football-legends.streamlit.app)
